name: @gnireeg/fly-out
description: Accessible fly-out web component with smooth animations, keyboard support, and background overlay
author: Joel Geering <joel@geering.dev> (https://geering.dev)

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/jsx.d.ts', 'dist/jsx.d.ts'); fs.copyFileSync('src/types-entry.d.ts', 'dist/types-entry.d.ts');"
